title: Cyberpunk RED - Weapon Additions
description: Adds advanced weapon handling to the Cyberpunk RED - CORE system: configurable autofire ammo cost, a Burst Fire mode with its own damage formula and ammo-type override, mixed-type magazine loading, area-of-effect target selection for grenades and rockets, automatic critical-injury linking in item descriptions, and three tiers of Burning that tick at end of turn.
